name: g2d3b: wider+denser concentration ladder, out-of-sample log-law test + kernel-MAE margin
origin: g2d3 (lamrho_prereg.json) returned AMBIG: lam(W) is PERFECTLY monotone (Spearman -1.00, lam 14.3->5.6) but span 2.56x < 3x bar and the pre-registered saturating-exp form fits poorly (R2=0.52); the data instead suggest lam ~ a - b*log10(W). g2d3b tests that data-suggested form OUT-OF-SAMPLE on a wider/denser ladder and adds a predictive kernel-MAE margin gate, to decide whether to SHIP a concentration-dependent rate.
hypothesis: lam(W) = a - b*log10(W) (concentration read off cooldown width). NOTE this log form was generated by g2d3's 5 points; it is tested here OUT-OF-SAMPLE: fit (a,b) on the ORIGINAL 5 arms (W in {1,10,40,160,640}, already on disk) and PREDICT the 6 NEW arms.

design.bed: m recipe, resume G3-replayed trunk_s1337/s1338, cool 1.5e-3 -> 1e-4 over width W then hold 1e-4 for 4000 steps; S-time relaxation fit r(S)=F+A*exp(-lam*(S-S_Wend)), r2>=0.6 gate; eval-bs=48 gen 12345
design.new_arms: W in {4, 80, 320, 1280, 2560, 5120} x seeds {1337,1338} = 12 new arms; combined with the existing 5 widths x 2 seeds gives an 11-point rho grid spanning rho ~ 14 (W=1) down to ~0.0005 (W=5120)
design.cost: ~3-4 GPU-h on one RTX 5090 (deepest arm W=5120 ~9120 steps; P=8)

verdicts.RATE_READS_RHO_CONFIRMED: ALL of: (a) full-grid Spearman(lam,W) <= -0.9; (b) full-grid span lam_max/lam_min >= 3x; (c) log-law fit on the ORIGINAL 5 arms predicts the 6 NEW arms with held-out R2 >= 0.8; (d) the per-arm log-law-predicted lam cuts the POOLED relaxation-curve MAE by >= 20% vs the single best global fixed-lam (each arm: refit F,A with lam fixed at the log-law value vs at the global-best value). -> SHIP a concentration-dependent rate lam(rho); upgrade the kernel + paper round-2; +1 DOF (slope b) justified by the held-out predictive gain.
verdicts.RATE_READS_RHO_WEAK: monotone (Spearman <= -0.9) and span >= 3x but held-out log-law R2 < 0.8 OR MAE margin < 20% -> the concentration dependence is real and now spans >3x, but no clean closed form / insufficient predictive gain to justify replacing fixed-lam; report measured, KEEP fixed-lam (this STRENGTHENS g2d3's AMBIG with the wider range and a proper out-of-sample test).
verdicts.FLAT: span < 2x or Spearman > -0.7 on the full grid -> falsified (not expected given g2d3).

dof_note: if CONFIRMED, +1 DOF (log slope b) over fixed lam_slow, gated on out-of-sample held-out R2 AND >=20% pooled-MAE predictive margin; else rejected. G5: MPL backbone not refit verdict-bearing.
